description: This video explains the Internet of Things (IoT), covering its definition, history, and functionality. It discusses the convergence of technologies like RFID and the role of sensors in connecting non-computing devices to the Internet for remote monitoring and control.
topic_summary: The Internet of Things (IoT) represents a new phase of the web where various devices, including non-computing ones, are connected to the Internet. This enables automation and control on a large scale, with cryptocurrencies playing a role in facilitating microtransactions for these processes. [t=1:12] [t=125:55]
